Heavy-Duty Banner Frame Systems for Long-Term Commercial Use

Banner Frames are a revolutionary way to install and display banners on any type of flat surface. These surfaces include brick, wood, concrete, metal, and more. Banner Frames are engineered to be used under the most extreme outdoor conditions while maintaining their professional appearance throughout your display's lifetime.

The vinyl banners swap out in minutes, making it effortless to keep your signage updated for any sales, seasonal promotions, or marketing campaigns you may be running. Make your commercial signage look professional with our durable Banner Frame systems.

Complete Banner Frame Kit Includes:

  • Professional Lind Banner Frame hardware system
  • Custom printed vinyl banner for your frame
  • All necessary mounting hardware for installation
  • Weather-resistant construction for outdoor use

Transform your business exterior with professional banner frame displays that withstand harsh weather conditions while keeping your messaging fresh and visible.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Material Options for Professional Banner Frame Display

Choose from our premium vinyl materials specifically designed for banner frame applications:

13 oz Vinyl Banner Material

Our standard banner material, engineered for both indoor and outdoor banner frame installations. This material provides excellent durability for most commercial applications while maintaining cost-effectiveness for your display needs.

18 oz Heavy-Duty Vinyl Material

Our most robust material option that delivers extreme durability for demanding outdoor banner frame installations. This heavy-duty vinyl is specifically recommended for high-traffic areas and harsh weather conditions.

Size Variance Information:

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed due to the temperature-sensitive nature of vinyl during printing and finishing processes. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (example: A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). For precision installations, please consult with your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific banner frame application.

Request a free sample packet of materials to evaluate quality before placing your banner frame order.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Finishing & Hardware Installation Options

Our banner frames come complete with professional-grade finishing and hardware designed for long-term outdoor installations:

Professional Banner Frame Hardware

  • Lind Banner Frame system with weather-resistant coating
  • Stainless steel mounting hardware included
  • Quick-change banner attachment system
  • Corrosion-resistant finish for outdoor durability

Banner Finishing for Frame Installation

  • Precision-cut banners sized for perfect frame fit
  • Reinforced edges for secure frame attachment
  • Weather-sealed hems for outdoor durability
  • Professional finishing ensures easy banner changes

Each banner frame system is engineered for professional installation on various surfaces including brick, wood, concrete, and metal surfaces, providing versatile mounting options for your commercial display needs.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Production Times & Order Processing

We offer reliable production schedules for your banner frame projects:

Standard Production Timeline

7-10 Business Day Standard Production
This is our most popular turnaround option for banner frames. This timeline includes both frame preparation and custom banner printing to ensure your complete system is ready for installation.

Important Timeline Notes:

  • Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time
  • Banner frame systems require additional processing time due to hardware coordination

Proof Approval Process

If you request an order proof for your banner design, production will not begin until you provide approval. This additional step helps ensure your banner frame display meets your exact specifications before manufacturing begins.

For rush orders or specific installation deadlines, please contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss expedited production options for your banner frame project.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Options for Custom Banner Frame Orders

We offer flexible payment methods for your banner frame purchase:

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards
  • Business checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Purchase orders for qualified commercial accounts

Payment Processing Timeline

All banner frame orders must be paid in full before production begins. We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order and any requested proofs.

For check payments, your banner frame order will enter production once payment is received and cleared. Learn more about check payment processing for banner frame orders.

Commercial Account Options

Businesses placing regular banner frame orders may qualify for commercial payment terms. Contact our customer service team to discuss account setup and payment options for ongoing banner frame installations.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Shipping Guidelines & Delivery Methods

Professional shipping options for your banner frame systems:

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy (5–10 Business Days) - Cost-effective for standard banner frame orders
  • Standard (3–5 Business Days) - Most popular shipping option
  • Three Day (3 Business Days) - Expedited delivery
  • Two Day (2 Business Days) - Fast delivery for time-sensitive installations
  • Overnight (1 Business Day) - Rush delivery for urgent banner frame needs

Banner Frame Shipping Considerations

Shipping costs are determined by package weight and destination. Banner frame systems may incur additional shipping charges due to size and weight requirements.

Tracking and Delivery:

  • You will receive tracking information once your banner frame ships
  • All shipping company terms apply for lost or delayed packages
  • Damaged banner frames must be returned for replacement processing

International Shipping for Banner Frames

For international banner frame shipments, customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only.

For specific shipping questions about your banner frame order, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Common Installation Uses for 4' x 12' Banner Frames

Professional banner frames provide versatile display solutions for numerous commercial and institutional applications:

Commercial Building Applications

  • Retail storefront displays and promotional messaging
  • Restaurant and hospitality exterior advertising
  • Office building directory and wayfinding displays
  • Shopping center tenant advertising and announcements

Construction and Industrial Sites

  • Construction site safety messaging and project information
  • Industrial facility identification and safety displays
  • Contractor advertising at job sites
  • Development project marketing and leasing information

Institutional and Municipal Uses

  • School campus event promotion and wayfinding
  • Municipal building announcements and public notices
  • Healthcare facility directional signage
  • Government facility identification and messaging

Event and Seasonal Applications

  • Seasonal promotion displays with easy banner changes
  • Event venue advertising and sponsorship displays
  • Holiday and special event messaging
  • Trade show and exhibition entrance displays

The 4' x 12' size provides excellent visibility for high-traffic areas while maintaining professional appearance in any commercial environment.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Banner Frame Printing

Ensure optimal print quality for your banner frame display with proper artwork preparation:

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector files (.eps) - Best quality option with fonts converted to outlines
  • High-resolution PDF files - Excellent for most banner frame designs
  • High-resolution JPEG or TIFF - Minimum 300 DPI recommended

Banner Frame Template Resources

Use our professional templates for accurate banner frame sizing:

  • 4' x 12' Banner Frame EPS Template
  • 4' x 12' Banner Frame PDF Template

Artwork Preparation Guidelines

  • Design at actual banner frame size (42" x 138")
  • Include 0.25" bleed area around entire design
  • Keep important text and logos 1" from banner frame edges
  • Use CMYK color mode for accurate printing

Professional Design Services

Our in-house graphic designers can create custom artwork for your banner frame. Simply provide your logo, text, and design preferences, and we'll create professional artwork optimized for banner frame display.

Color Matching for Banner Frames

For color-critical banner frame projects, we recommend our Color Match Proof System to ensure accurate color reproduction for your brand standards.

If you're unsure about your artwork quality for banner frame printing, our professional graphic designers are available to review and optimize your files.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Banner Frames

What surfaces can banner frames be mounted on?

Banner frames are designed for installation on various flat surfaces including brick, wood, concrete, metal siding, and other solid exterior walls. The mounting hardware accommodates most common commercial building materials.

How long do banner frame systems last outdoors?

Our banner frame hardware is engineered for long-term outdoor use with weather-resistant coatings and stainless steel components. The frames can withstand extreme weather conditions for years of reliable service, while banners can be easily replaced as needed.

Can I change banners in existing frames?

Yes, the banner frame system is specifically designed for quick banner changes. Once the frame is installed, new banners can be swapped out in minutes without tools, making it easy to update your messaging for different seasons, sales, or promotions.

What's the difference between 13 oz and 18 oz vinyl for banner frames?

13 oz vinyl is our standard material suitable for most banner frame applications, while 18 oz vinyl provides extra durability for high-wind areas or heavy-use installations. Both materials are designed for outdoor use with banner frame systems.

Do you provide installation instructions for banner frames?

Yes, each banner frame system includes detailed installation instructions and all necessary mounting hardware. We also provide video tutorials and customer support to ensure successful installation.

Can I order replacement banners for existing frames?

Absolutely. We maintain templates for all banner frame sizes and can produce replacement banners for existing frame installations. Simply specify your frame size when ordering replacement banners.

What file formats do you accept for banner frame artwork?

We accept vector files (.eps), high-resolution PDFs, and high-quality JPEG or TIFF files (300 DPI minimum). For best results, use our provided banner frame templates to ensure proper sizing and layout.

Do banner frames work in high-wind areas?

Yes, banner frames are specifically engineered for outdoor conditions including high-wind environments. The frame system provides secure banner attachment that prevents flapping and extends banner life compared to traditional hanging methods.
